sections.heading: Meaning
sections.content: Public service refers to services provided by the government to its citizens and includes ministries responsible for administration and policy implementation.

sections.heading: Structure
sections.content: The civil service structure includes administrative, executive, professional, clerical, and messengerial classes.

sections.heading: Problems
sections.content: Problems include corruption, nepotism, policy inconsistency, bureaucracy, and poor work attitude.

sections.heading: Improvements
sections.content: Improvements include merit-based employment, better working conditions, political neutrality, and adherence to rules.
